content: The intrinsic reward bonuses that power curiosity-driven methods like ICM and RND can be repurposed as a dynamic memory pruning signal for state-of-the-art 2024-2025 active learning agents, where only unexpected, high-curiosity transitions are retained in long-term episodic memory, rather than pruning based on recency or reward magnitude alone.
source_topics: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
trigger_topic: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
